---
title: "Laptop Prices Prediction"
subtitle: "Group 2"
date: today
author: "Lee Tsung Yu"
format:
  html: 
   embed-resources: true
#  pdf:
#    include-in-header:
#      - text: |
#         \usepackage{setspace,relsize}
#mainfont: "Microsoft JhengHei UI"
toc: true
bibliography: references.bib
---

# Introduction  



## DataSource 

```{r}
#| output: asis
library(Hmisc)
dt <- read.csv("data/customers100.csv")
latex(describe(dt), file="", caption.placement = "top")
```

## Summary Statistics

## Data Visualisation

```{r}
plot(mtcars)
```

## Missing Values  

# Data Analysis

# Final Results

This is my reference [@cabrera2013]
